nodes.label: Run the NFL Prediction API server.
Tests for InjuryScraper and related constants.
filter_key_players() keeps position + significant status only.
ESPN_TEAM_MAP covers all 32 current teams (internal abbreviations).
Every internal abbreviation in STADIUM_COORDS appears as a value in ESPN_TEAM_MA
Build a minimal mock DB for unit tests.
Matchup score returns valid float for real teams.
Projection for a real player returns valid structure.
Draft rankings generate without error and return a list.
Basic tests for NFL Prediction System.
Verify we have all 32 NFL teams.
Test getting team by PFR abbreviation.
Test inserting and retrieving a team.
Test exponential weight decays over time.
Scraper tests — HTML parsing and team mapping resolution.
PHI @ DAL — winner column shows PHI with @ indicator.
The fixture has a thead row in the middle; it should be skipped.
Some historical PFR abbreviations should map to current teams.
Prediction engine and metrics tests against the real database.
Feature array must have exactly 34 elements (32 base + 2x QB EPA; vegas removed)
All FEATURE_NAMES must appear in the feature dict.
Engine._use_ml is consistent with whether the model actually loaded.
GET /api/model/info returns 200 with a model_type field.
generate_shap_explanation returns [] when model is None.
With ML model loaded, generate_shap_explanation returns a list.
Each explanation entry has all required keys.
Direction is derived correctly from shap_value thresholds.
Tests for the roster DB methods.
Upserting a player then fetching by espn_id returns the same record.
Upserting a roster entry succeeds without error.
Upserting stats then reading them back returns correct values.
get_team_starters returns starters with is_starter=True before backups.
API endpoint tests using FastAPI TestClient against the real database.
Requesting odds for a non-existent game returns 404.
POST /api/predict always includes vegas_context key (None when no odds stored).
Requesting conditions for a non-existent game returns 404.
Conditions endpoint for a real game returns the expected structure.
GET /api/teams/{id}/roster returns team_abbr, season, players, count.
GET /api/fantasy/top returns position, season, players list.
GET /api/picks/value returns picks list, generated_at, and note.
Each pick in /api/picks/value has the required schema fields.
Picks are returned sorted by absolute edge descending.
Tests for WeatherScraper dome logic and WMO code mapping.
Dome teams should return immediately without making any HTTP call.
_wmo_condition maps WMO codes to correct condition strings.
Tests for the per-position player ML feature builder and model wrapper.
